# chalk_scaling_group (Resource)

Manages a Chalk scaling group — a horizontally (auto)scalable container deployment.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_spec` (Attributes) Container specification describing what to run in each replica. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--container_spec))
- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID that this scaling group is scoped to.
- `name` (String) Unique name for the scaling group.
- `scaling_spec` (Attributes) Autoscaling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scaling_spec))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The scaling group id.
- `status` (String) Current status of the scaling group (e.g. Pending, Available, etc).
- `status_message` (String) Additional status details.
- `web_url` (String) Web URL to access the scaling group.

<a id="nestedatt--container_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container_spec`

Required:

- `image` (String) Image to run.

Optional:

- `authentication` (String) Authentication mode: `UNAUTHENTICATED` (default) or `AUTHENTICATED`.
- `entrypoint` (List of String) Entrypoint command and arguments.
- `env_vars` (Map of String) Environment variables to inject into the container.
- `port` (Number) Port to expose from the container.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol for the container's HTTP route: `http` (default) or `grpc`.
- `resources` (Attributes) Resource limits for the container. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--container_spec--resources))
- `routing` (String) Routing mode: `PUBLIC` or `PRIVATE`.
- `tags` (Map of String) User-defined tags for the container.
- `volumes` (Attributes List) Volumes to mount into the container. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--container_spec--volumes))

<a id="nestedatt--container_spec--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container_spec.resources`

Optional:

- `cpu` (String) CPU limit, e.g. `2` or `500m`.
- `gpu` (String) GPU request, e.g. `nvidia-tesla-t4:1`.
- `memory` (String) Memory limit, e.g. `4Gi` or `512Mi`.


<a id="nestedatt--container_spec--volumes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container_spec.volumes`

Required:

- `mount_path` (String) Path inside the container to mount the volume.
- `name` (String) Name of the volume.
- `type` (String) Volume type: `empty_dir`, `shared_memory`, or `chalkfs`.

Optional:

- `size_limit` (String) Size limit for the volume, e.g. `2Gi`.



<a id="nestedatt--scaling_spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scaling_spec`

Required:

- `max_replicas` (Number) Maximum number of replicas.
- `min_replicas` (Number) Minimum number of replicas (0 for scale-to-zero).

Optional:

- `shutdown_delay_seconds` (Number) Graceful termination period in seconds (default: 30).
- `target_cpu_utilization_percentage` (Number) Target CPU utilization percentage for autoscaling.
